summary: ThreeDScene: circular polarization = two linear waves 90° out of phase. Along +x, 22 BLUE Arrow3D show E_y = A cos(kx-ωt), 22 YELLOW show E_z = A sin(kx-ωt), and 22 GREEN show the vector sum E = E_y ŷ + E_z ẑ, all redrawn via always_redraw as ValueTracker t_tr advances. A GREEN ParametricFunction helix traces the E-tip path in space. Fixed-frame legend labels each component with MathTex.
